title: dyschoriste quadrangularis
intro: Dyschoriste quadrangularis, also known as the quadrangular dyschoriste, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Dyschoriste quadrangularis include its potential to treat fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or by using them in a decoction, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
